---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, endpoint, dashboard improvement, or doc addition.
title: "[feat] "
labels: [enhancement, triage]
assignees: []
---

# Feature request

## Customer outcome

What customer outcome does this enable? Frame the **why** before the **what**. If you can't articulate the customer outcome, this probably belongs as a discussion, not a feature request.

## Proposed change

Surface and shape of the change. New endpoint? New SKU? Dashboard view? Doc clarification?

- Surface: `api/` / `web/` / `docs/` / other
- Scope: small / medium / large

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is the proposed change better than the alternatives?

## Compliance / billing impact

- [ ] No impact on billing model
- [ ] No impact on data flows
- [ ] No new external service dependency

If any of the above are unchecked, explain. SKU-level requests (new SKU, new pricing tier, new SLA) need maintainer sign-off before a PR lands; please get that here before opening the PR.

## Additional context

Mockups, prior art from comparable products, customer quotes (anonymized), or anything else that helps maintainers decide.
